title: Aquatic Therapy on Motor and Behavioral Skills in Children with ASD
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ccqf5","text":"This protocol describes a single-center randomized controlled trial evaluating the effects of a 12-week structured aquatic therapy program on motor coordination and behavioral outcomes in children aged 5–12 years with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). The intervention includes twice-weekly, 45-minute sessions combining warm-up, orientation, playful motor-based aquatic activities, and cool-down, compared to standard care.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7ruj4","text":"The study is expected to demonstrate improvements in motor coordination (BOT-2) and reductions in behavioral symptoms (ABC), alongside positive parental feedback. Results will address evidence gaps in aquatic therapy for ASD and may inform best practices for community-based pediatric neurorehabilitation, particularly in resource-limited settings.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4kfq7","text":"Informed Consent: Obtain written informed consent from parents or legal guardians before participation.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"af3di","text":"Safety Protocols: All sessions will be conducted in a child-safe pool with supervision at all times. Emergency protocols must be in place, including trained lifeguards and access to first aid.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9j1to","text":"Ethical Considerations: Adhere to ethical guidelines for research involving children, ensuring their privacy, safety, and well-being. The study must be approved by an Institutional Review Board (IRB) prior to initiation.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"767oe","text":"Pre-start Information: Participants must be diagnosed with Level 1 or 2 ASD according to DSM-5 criteria and confirmed by ADOS-2 and CARS-2.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bj19s","text":"Pre-screening: Medical screening to assess if participants are physically fit for aquatic therapy. Exclude children with contraindications for water-based activities.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3k9a3","text":"Intervention Monitoring: Ensure therapist-to-child ratio is maintained as per protocol to monitor progress and adjust the therapy as needed.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"f00j0","text":"Supervision: Ensure constant supervision by trained aquatic therapists and lifeguards during all sessions.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"80jt0","text":"Contraindications: Exclude children with medical conditions (e.g., severe epilepsy, heart issues) that contraindicate aquatic activities.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dconl","text":"Emergency Protocols: All staff must be trained in CPR and first aid. Emergency contacts should be readily available.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cfte1","text":"Water Temperature: Monitor and maintain water temperature within a safe range (82–86°F or 28–30°C).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fve9t","text":"Therapist-to-Child Ratio: Maintain at least a 1:3 ratio of therapist to children for safety.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"43v00","text":"Participant Behavior: Stop activities if a participant shows distress or discomfort and reassess as needed.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f1eq4","text":"Hydration: Provide water to participants during sessions to prevent dehydration.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eqb2e","text":"Adverse Events: Report any incidents or injuries immediately and take necessary actions.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"48qsc","text":"Parent/Guardian Involvement: Obtain written consent from guardians and encourage their presence during sessions.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":27}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1dfmj","text":"Assessment Tools: Ensure trained personnel administer assessments (BOT-2, ABC) to avoid inaccurate results.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"cr1kj","text":"Aquatic Therapy Pool:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9s3k5","text":"Shallow, child-safe pool with water temperature maintained at 82–86°F (28–30°C).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b7gfr","text":"Therapeutic Equipment:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4g1c6","text":"Kickboards, pool noodles, balls, hula hoops, floating devices, and water toys.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"au1cs","text":"Safety Gear:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"al7fl","text":"Life vests or floatation devices, non-slip water shoes, towels, and warm blankets.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ab7rh","text":"Assessment Tools:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"efh31","text":"Bruininks-Oseretsky Test of Motor Proficiency (BOT-2), Aberrant Behavior Checklist (ABC), parent feedback forms.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9lh2j","text":"Therapist Materials:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"84meb","text":"Whistle, stopwatch, first aid kit, waterproof writing pads.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"29da3","text":"Health and Comfort:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5421c","text":"Hydration supplies, sunscreen (if outdoor), extra clothing, and dry towels.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"75u1p","text":"Documentation:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lpg5","text":"Consent forms, parent/guardian contact forms, emergency contact list, and participant medical history forms.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2eiem","text":"Emergency Equipment:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f6847","text":"Life-saving devices (e.g., rescue buoy), communication devices, poolside safety signage.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Iffat Ara Nasrin Chaity
